title: 用户签名功能（Java 栈，对照 R1 的 control case）
prompt: A product manager says: end users should be able to set a personal signature on their profile, and admins should be able to see it on user detail and export it via the list export. Do not modify code. Produce an impact analysis and implementation plan.

forbidden_claims: 在 Java 栈降级为 generic（应正确识别并加载 java-spring-mybatis profile）

trap_for: 同 R1 但观察是否正确选择 java-spring-mybatis profile
